'''Drevveka Hoctu''' was once a great [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], until she was consumed by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] many [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. She wandered [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] until she ended up on [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], and eventually became the headmaster of the [[Sith Arts Academy]].

She was feared by her students, living up to her reputation as a cruel master, and was known to have forced her students into the [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] of Thule on long, relentless training sessions that forced them to rely on the dark side for strength.

Despite her reputation and skills, Hoctu was never given a rank higher than headmaster. As a result, she vowed to one day make her superiors pay for this humiliation.
